description: CompositionBlue T-shirt made of 60% cotton and 40% polyester Dri-Fit fabric, has a round ribbed neckline, short sleeves, contoured side seams and graphic print on the frontFittingRegularWash careMachine wash cold with like coloursDo not bleachTumble dry on lowWarm iron onlyDo not dry cleanDo not iron on print or embroideryThis blue T-shirt from nike is a perfect mix of sporty style and bold colours. The graphic print with the running legs peeking from the side inspires you to get moving, while the Dri-Fit fabric wicks sweat away from the body to keep you feeling cool and comfortable all day long. Team this with jeans or tracks.
